headline: Comfort Systems and Tractor Supply have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
summary: Comfort Systems shines on strong earnings and backlog growth, while Tractor Supply faces pressure after a miss and weak outlook.

headline: Bear of the Day: Tractor Supply (TSCO)
summary: Farm and ranch retailer drops on earnings miss and weak outlook.
